citations.narrative:
The facility did not create and maintain complete medical records for all treatments given to puppies at the kennel. Prior to
delivery to the buyer, the facility gives each puppy a ponazuril/SMZ combination liquid medication once a day for three
days for the treatment or prevention of intestinal parasites. The facility has not been recording those doses of medication
administration.
It is important to keep complete medical records so that the medical history can be relayed to the new owners, and to
ensure the correct dosages and timing of administration of medication is being carried out according to the instruction by
the veterinarian. Correct by ensuring the facility keeps copies of medical records including the dates and names of all
vaccines and treatments administered. Correct by: 3/16/2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
3.13(b)(3) 
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
The facility did not create and maintain complete medical records for all treatments given to puppies at the kennel. Prior to 
delivery to the buyer, the facility gives each puppy a ponazuril/SMZ combination liquid medication once a day for three 
days for the treatment or prevention of intestinal parasites. The facility has not been recording those doses of medication 
administration.  
 
It is important to keep complete medical records so that the medical history can be relayed to the new owners, and to 
ensure the correct dosages and timing of administration of medication is being carried out according to the instruction by  
the veterinarian. Correct by ensuring the facility keeps copies of medical records including the dates and names of all 
vaccines and treatments administered. Correct by: 3/16/2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee. 
 
 n
